HeatPower.title: Heat
HeatPower.description: If Heat is 70 or higher, add 1 Burn to discard at end of turn. If Heat is 200 or higher, gain 1 Body Burn per 100 Heat at end of turn.
BodyBurnPower.title: Body Burn
BodyBurnPower.description: Whenever you play a card, take damage equal to Body Burn. At end of turn, lose 1.
